alerts.title: 🚨 LinkedIn Analytics API — ACCESS_DENIED (403)
alerts.meta: Fields 'clickThroughRate' and 'name' blocked. All campaign-level and 7-day trend analytics unavailable. Token scopes require rw_ads + r_ads_reporting. Resolve immediately to restore daily reporting.

alerts.title: CTR Drop — -18.4% WoW (Threshold: >15%)
alerts.meta: Account CTR fell from ~0.71% to 0.58% WoW as of 2026-03-07. Exceeds HIGH alert threshold of -15%. Likely creative fatigue or audience overlap across 6 active campaigns.

alerts.title: CPL Spike — +24.7% WoW (Threshold: >20%)
alerts.meta: Average CPL rose to ₹126.10 vs prior week. Exceeds HIGH alert threshold of +20%. With leads also down -11.8% WoW, both volume and efficiency are deteriorating simultaneously.

alerts.title: Lead Volume Down -11.8% WoW
alerts.meta: Total leads dropped to 34 on 2026-03-07 vs ~38.6 implied prior-week average. Combined with CPL spike, indicates audience saturation or bid competitiveness issue.

alerts.title: Zero Delivery on 2026-03-06 — All Campaigns
alerts.meta: read_history shows totalSpend=₹0, impressions=0, leads=0 on Mar 6. Possible LinkedIn platform outage, billing issue, or campaign scheduling gap. Verify billing and campaign status.

opportunities.title: Broadcasters & OTT — ABM Campaigns Under-indexed
opportunities.meta: Two ABM campaigns targeting Broadcasters & OTT (US + EU) are active but campaign-level spend breakdown is unavailable due to API block. Once resolved, audit whether ABM budgets are capped vs. league-targeting campaigns which have historically higher CTR.

opportunities.title: EU Expansion — Leagues Pulse Campaign Active
opportunities.meta: 'Leagues - pulse - EU' is a recently launched geo — if CPL is lower than US counterpart (leagues - US - pulse), shift incremental budget to EU to improve blended CPL.

opportunities.title: Website Visits Campaign — Misaligned Objective
opportunities.meta: 'Website visits - Image Ads' runs WEBSITE_VISIT objective on ₹3,000/day budget while all other campaigns run LEAD_GENERATION. No lead tracking on this campaign. Evaluate whether it is contributing to pipeline or purely brand — if latter, reallocate budget to lead-gen campaigns with proven CPL.
